title: Brothers in Blood: The Lions of Sabi Sand
original_title: Brothers in Blood: The Lions of Sabi Sand
overview: This is a powerful documentary, filmed over a 16 year span, about the rise of a Coalition of six lions, branded The Mapogo Lions, and their takeover of the largest territory by a pride.
